name: agentic-acss-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins for building accessible React components, CSS themes, and utility classes for fpkit/acss projects

plugins.name: acss-kit
plugins.description: Generate accessible React components and CSS themes for fpkit/acss projects. Run /setup to bootstrap a new project (sass check, ui.tsx copy, starter theme). Then use /kit-add for components and /theme-create for themes. No @fpkit/acss npm package required.

plugins.name: acss-utilities
plugins.description: Tailwind-style atomic CSS utility classes for fpkit/acss projects, mirroring @fpkit/acss@6.5.0 conventions (.bg-primary, .mt-4, .sm:hide, etc.). Pairs with acss-kit via a token-bridge that aliases acss-kit's OKLCH roles to fpkit-style names in both light and dark modes. Run /utility-add to drop the bundle into your project.
